title: tutorial 4-key staged learning chart
purpose: First-song tutorial chart that keeps the staged learning goals while aligning note timing more closely to the song groove.
patternDesign: Re-analyzed around 93 BPM with the strongest grid phase at 4.00s. Learning structure is preserved: first 4s silence, first quarter single taps only, second quarter holds only, third quarter two-key chords only, final quarter gentle mixed review. Notes now land mostly on audible downbeats and phrase pulses instead of fixed arbitrary spacing.

sections.name: listen first
sections.intent: first four seconds contain no notes so new players can hear the groove before acting

sections.name: single notes only
sections.intent: teach one-button timing with musical downbeat and late-beat taps, no holds or chords

sections.name: hold notes only
sections.intent: teach pressing and holding one lane at a time, with starts on strong phrase beats

sections.name: two key notes only
sections.intent: teach simple two-key hits on clear phrase pulses after taps and holds are understood
sections.patternIntent: chord-only third quarter, sparse and musical

sections.name: gentle review
sections.intent: finish with a calm mix of single taps, long notes, and two-key notes that follows the ending energy

single_intro_DF.description: First silent-gap single-note lesson using only D and F on the song pulse.

single_intro_JK.description: Single-note lesson for J and K as a right-hand answer phrase.

single_full_walk.description: Slow D F J K / K J F D walk with missing beats for beginner breathing room.

single_lesson_cadence.description: Single tap cadence before hold notes begin.

hold_basic_left.description: Long-note lesson on the left side with starts on phrase downbeats.

hold_basic_right.description: Long-note lesson on the right side with starts on phrase downbeats.

chord_basic_split.description: Two-key lesson using separated left-right pairs on strong pulses.

chord_basic_color.description: Two-key lesson using outer and inner alternate pairs.

review_single.description: Final review single taps placed on the ending phrase.

review_hold.description: Final review long notes with empty space around them.

review_chord.description: Final review two-key hits used as soft musical rewards.

notes.intent: first D lands exactly on the first strong tutorial pulse after silence
second left-hand tap follows the next audible pulse
first right-hand tap starts the answer phrase
second right-hand tap follows the phrase pulse
slow walk restarts on a downbeat
late beat answer leaves space for beginners
right-side downbeat answer
late beat close
musical D F pickup starts on the bar accent
pickup follows the audible beat
reverse walk begins on the next phrase
reverse pickup
left answer after the reverse pair
late beat close before the lesson changes
single-note cadence on the final strong beat of the first lesson
first hold begins on a strong phrase downbeat
second hold follows the next stable phrase
third hold moves to the right hand on a downbeat
fourth hold teaches the far-right lane with space after it
shorter review hold matches the later phrase pulse
final hold starts on a late phrase accent before chords begin
first split-hand chord arrives after a clear setup gap
second split-hand chord follows the next strong pulse
outer-lane chord on a high-energy bar
inner-lane chord answers the previous bar
repeat split chord on a clear beat
repeat opposite split chord with wide spacing
late chord locks to the stronger bar-27 pulse
final chord-only lesson lands before mixed review
mixed review starts with a single downbeat tap
second single tap follows the phrase
review hold begins on a strong ending pulse
split chord checks simultaneous input after a hold
second hold uses the inner-left lane
bright chord lands on a high-energy late bar
single tap recovery after the chord
outer chord follows the song accent without a fast run
final short hold on the right-hand lane
inner chord checks the last learned shape
final single anchor near the ending phrase
soft final two-key finish on the late phrase pulse
